message:
test(fj-conformance): add comprehensive oracle tests for Pow primitive

Adds 26 tests covering basic powers, zero/one exponents, zero/one bases,
negative exponents, fractional exponents (roots), negative bases with
integer exponents, infinity handling, NaN propagation, and tensor shapes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
